title: Myself, Yourself, By Himself
description: Reflexive pronouns: myself, yourself, himself, herself, itself, ourselves, yourselves, themselves. Plus BY + reflexive = alone.
summary_pt_br: Pronomes reflexivos em inglês: myself, yourself, himself, herself, itself, ourselves, yourselves, themselves. Uso: quando sujeito e objeto são a mesma pessoa ('I hurt myself'). Expressão 'BY + reflexivo' = sozinho ('I went by myself').

scenes.text_en:
'I cut MYSELF surfing,' Bia said.
'Did you go to the hospital BY YOURSELF?'
'Yes, by myself. Rafa was busy.'
Maya chimed in: 'I taught MYSELF English from movies.'
scenes.text_pt:
'Me cortei surfando,' disse a Bia.
'Você foi ao hospital SOZINHA?'
'Sim, sozinha. O Rafa tava ocupado.'
Maya entrou: 'Eu APRENDI inglês sozinha assistindo filme.'

scenes.title: Two uses
scenes.body_en: 1) When subject = object. 'I hurt MYSELF.' 'She taught HERSELF to surf.' 2) BY + reflexive = alone. 'I went by myself.' (I went alone.) Forms: myself, yourself, himself, herself, itself, ourselves, yourselves, themselves. Two plural -s endings only.
scenes.body_pt: 1) Sujeito = objeto. 'I hurt myself.' 2) BY + reflexivo = sozinho. Formas: myself, yourself, himself, herself, itself, ourselves, yourselves, themselves.

examples.en: I taught myself. / He hurt himself. / They enjoyed themselves.
